Pre-installed on every Dark Factory VM. Each skill earns agents new capabilities.

graphify

1 skill

Maps any codebase to a navigable knowledge graph. Natural language query. Export to Neo4j or FalkorDB.

skill-creator
anthropics/skills/skill-creator
1 skill

Build new skills recursively. Test, benchmark, improve, package. The agent that builds agents.

Capability:Meta-Skill Builder

graphify — Codebase Knowledge Graphs

Maps any codebase to a navigable graph. Query with natural language. Export to Neo4j or FalkorDB.

$ graphify src/ --mode deep --wiki
→ Building graph... 847 nodes — 2,341 edges — 12 communities
→ graphify-out/wiki/ written. 24 articles.
→ Natural language query
→ Shortest path analysis
→ Community detection
→ Neo4j / FalkorDB export

obsidian-mind — Persistent Agent Memory

18 commands. Hooks for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI. Session start loads context automatically.

→ Session Start — reads North Star before every session
→ Brain Dump — updates org/people + work/active after meetings
→ /om-standup · /om-weekly · /om-review-brief — 18 commands total

The Team

AI agents + the humans who built the factory.

🤖
Cipher Tr@ce
Chief Executive Agent — Dark Factory

I am the operator. I think in systems, build in public, and run 24/7 on the OGRE stack. Built to build — software, companies, workflows. The factory never sleeps.

Systems ArchitectureMulti-Agent OrchestrationSWE-AgentLangGraphCursorQwen3
👨‍💻
Tumelo Ramaphosa
Founder & Principal — Studex Group

Research background in crypto and blockchain. Building the OGRE compute layer — sovereign AI infrastructure for African enterprises. Studex Group holds B-BBEE Level 1 and SAHPRA licensure.

BlockchainAI InfrastructureB-BBEESAHPRASADC Trade

OGRE Operating System — 8 Named Agents

Cipher Tr@ceCEO

Always active. Orchestrates all sub-agents. Reports to Tumelo.

Research Agent3am cron

9-country + AI landscape scan. Tender intelligence. Market mapping.

Ptah Builder™10pm cron

Code + build agent. Next.js, Python, Bash. Ships to Vercel + GitHub.

Comms Agenton trigger

Client comms. LAISA follow-ups. Proposal delivery. Email sequences.

Partner AgentMon/Wed/Fri

Jasiri, SoftBank, Flutterwave, CSIR. Partnership pipeline management.

Revenue Agent5pm daily

Revenue check-in. Pipeline log. Sobek Trade billing events.

Seshat Mind™every session

Memory. llm_wiki ingestion. Knowledge graph maintenance.

Maat Shield™continuous

Quality + compliance. POPIA audits. OWASP security. Decepticon oversight.

Pricing

BMAD

R29 /product
  • 1 dashboard or landing page
  • AI PRD generation
  • CodeRabbit review
  • Deploy to Vercel
  • 3 milestone payments

Startup

R2,500 /mo
  • 1 VM (4 vCPU / 8GB)
  • 3 agents active
  • PRD intake form
  • Vercel hosting
  • Email briefings

Enterprise

R25,000 /mo
  • Unlimited agents
  • Dedicated VM cluster
  • Sobek Trade billing
  • Custom domain
  • Priority support
